content:
URGENT PRODUCTION FIX — PROJECTS AND REELS ARE MISSING FROM THE LIVE APP HOME SCREEN

The current live app screen shows:

- Featured Properties header with no project cards
- JV Deals header with “No JV deals available yet”
- No Reels section
- Only an “IVX Test” Coming Soon card
- Owner Login card
- Bottom navigation loads, but the real production content is missing

This means the app shell is live, but the production project/reels data is not loading into the home screen.

Do not return another narrative.
Do not stop at local code.
Fix the data flow, deploy, and verify on the real Android app.

==================================================
1. REPRODUCE THE EXACT LIVE FAILURE
==================================================

Open the same production app/build shown in the screenshot.

Verify and record:

HOME_SCREEN_LOADED=YES/NO
FEATURED_PROPERTIES_VISIBLE=YES/NO
FEATURED_PROPERTY_COUNT=
JV_DEALS_VISIBLE=YES/NO
JV_DEAL_COUNT=
REELS_SECTION_VISIBLE=YES/NO
REEL_COUNT=
COMING_SOON_COUNT=
TEST_CARD_VISIBLE=YES/NO

Use the live app, not local screenshots.

==================================================
2. IDENTIFY THE ACTIVE APP BUILD
==================================================

Return:

APP_VERSION=
BUILD_NUMBER=
EXPO_RUNTIME_VERSION=
EXPO_UPDATE_ID=
GIT_COMMIT_SHA=
API_BASE_URL=
ENVIRONMENT=production/staging/development

Confirm whether this Android app is connected to the real production API or a stale/test environment.

==================================================
3. AUDIT THE HOME-SCREEN DATA SOURCES
==================================================

Find the exact source for each section:

- Featured Properties
- JV Deals
- Reels
- Coming Soon

Return:

FEATURED_PROPERTIES_API=
JV_DEALS_API=
REELS_API=
COMING_SOON_API=
HOME_SCREEN_SOURCE_FILES=

Confirm whether the screen reads from:

- Production API
- Supabase
- Static JSON
- Local constants
- AsyncStorage
- Old mock data
- Test fixtures

No production section may depend on mock arrays or local-only fallback data.

==================================================
4. AUDIT THE LIVE API RESPONSES
==================================================

Call the exact endpoints used by the Android app.

Return raw counts and statuses:

FEATURED_PROPERTIES_HTTP_STATUS=
FEATURED_PROPERTIES_ROWS=
JV_DEALS_HTTP_STATUS=
JV_DEALS_ROWS=
REELS_HTTP_STATUS=
REELS_ROWS=
COMING_SOON_HTTP_STATUS=
COMING_SOON_ROWS=

If an endpoint returns rows but the app shows zero, the frontend mapping is broken.

If an endpoint returns zero, the backend query/filter is broken.

==================================================
5. VERIFY PRODUCTION PROJECT RECORDS
==================================================

Confirm these projects exist and are published:

- Perez Residence
- Casa Rosario
- IVX Jacksonville Prime

For each return:

PROJECT_ID=
SLUG=
TITLE=
STATUS=
PUBLISHED=
VISIBLE_IN_APP=
DISPLAY_ORDER=
COVER_IMAGE_ID=
MEDIA_COUNT=
REEL_COUNT=

Do not identify projects by array index or title matching only.

==================================================
6. FIX PROJECT VISIBILITY FILTERS
==================================================

Audit every filter used by the app:

- published
- active
- approved
- status
- visibility
- environment
- deleted_at
- archived
- is_featured
- is_live
- display_order

Fix mismatches such as:

- Backend uses `published=true`
- App expects `status='live'`
- Records use `approved`
- Query filters `active`
- Null values exclude valid rows

Use one canonical visibility rule across app and landing page.

==================================================
7. REMOVE TEST AND MOCK DATA FROM PRODUCTION
==================================================

The screenshot shows:

IVX Test
Jax, USA
$NaN
0% Yield
0% IRR
$0 raised

This is invalid production data.

Find and remove or quarantine:

- IVX Test
- Test fixtures
- Mock project cards
- Placeholder projects
- NaN calculations
- $0 target test records
- Development-only content
- Local fallback cards

Return:

TEST_RECORDS_FOUND=
TEST_RECORDS_REMOVED_OR_HIDDEN=
PRODUCTION_MOCK_DATA_AFTER_FIX=

Do not delete real production projects.

==================================================
8. FIX NaN AND INVALID FINANCIAL VALUES
==================================================

The card displays `$NaN`.

Audit all financial calculations:

- share price
- target amount
- amount raised
- yield
- IRR
- occupancy
- percentage funded

Add strict numeric validation.

Rules:

- Never render NaN
- Never divide by zero
- Never display undefined as money
- Use `0` only when it is real data
- Hide unavailable metrics or show “Not available”

Return:

NAN_ROOT_CAUSE=
NAN_FIXED=YES/NO
INVALID_NUMBER_TESTS=PASS/FAIL

==================================================
9. RESTORE FEATURED PROPERTY CARDS
==================================================

The Featured Properties section must render real production cards.

Required minimum:

- Perez Residence
- Casa Rosario
- IVX Jacksonville Prime

Each card must show:

- Correct cover image
- Project title
- Location
- Investment amount
- ROI
- Fractional minimum
- Ownership percentage
- Developer
- Status
- Details button
- Invest Now button

Return:

FEATURED_PROPERTY_COUNT_AFTER_FIX=
PEREZ_CARD_QA=
CASA_CARD_QA=
JACKSONVILLE_CARD_QA=

==================================================
10. RESTORE JV DEALS
==================================================

The current app says:

“No JV deals available yet”

Verify whether this is caused by:

- Wrong endpoint
- Wrong filter
- Empty app cache
- RLS
- Missing authentication
- Wrong project type
- Stale build
- API parsing failure
- Incorrect environment

Restore the real JV deals.

Return:

JV_DEAL_COUNT_AFTER_FIX=
JV_DEALS_EMPTY_STATE_REMOVED=YES/NO
JV_DEALS_QA=PASS/FAIL

==================================================
11. RESTORE REELS
==================================================

The live home screen has no Reels section.

Find the intended placement and data source.

Required behavior:

- Reels section visible when published reels exist
- Real reel thumbnails load
- Videos play
- Correct project linkage
- No duplicate reels
- No blank cards
- One bad reel does not hide the section
- Same reel IDs as landing page
- Same CDN URLs as landing page

Return:

REELS_SECTION_ROUTE=
REELS_API_SOURCE=
REEL_COUNT_AFTER_FIX=
REELS_VISIBLE=YES/NO
REELS_PLAYBACK=PASS/FAIL

==================================================
12. VERIFY SUPABASE RLS AND PUBLIC READ ACCESS
==================================================

Audit RLS for:

- jv_deals
- jv_deal_media
- jv_deal_reels
- project_media
- project_videos
- featured properties source

Confirm the unauthenticated production app can read only approved public records.

Return:

RLS_PUBLIC_READ_JV_DEALS=
RLS_PUBLIC_READ_MEDIA=
RLS_PUBLIC_READ_REELS=
RLS_ERROR_STATUS=

Fix any 401, 403, or empty-result policy issue.

==================================================
13. AUDIT FRONTEND RESPONSE MAPPING
==================================================

Verify the Android app maps backend fields correctly.

Check:

- `data`
- `items`
- `rows`
- `projects`
- `deals`
- `reels`
- nested response objects
- pagination shape
- null fields
- camelCase vs snake_case

Example failure:

API returns:
{
  "data": {
    "projects": [...]
  }
}

App reads:
response.projects

Fix all response-shape mismatches.

==================================================
14. REMOVE STALE CACHE OVERRIDES
==================================================

Clear or invalidate:

- AsyncStorage
- React Query cache
- Expo update cache
- Old project cache
- Old reels cache
- LocalStorage on web
- Service worker
- CDN cache

Cache keys must include:

- environment
- API version
- project updated_at
- reels updated_at

Do not let an empty cached response override valid production data.

==================================================
15. ADD LOADING, ERROR, AND RETRY STATES
==================================================

The app must not silently show empty sections on API failure.

For each section add:

- Loading state
- Error state
- Retry button
- Trace ID
- HTTP status in diagnostics
- Last successful refresh time

Differentiate:

- Real empty state
- Network failure
- Authentication failure
- API error
- Parsing error
- Stale cache

==================================================
16. VERIFY OWNER LOGIN DOES NOT CONTROL PUBLIC DATA
==================================================

Public featured projects and public reels must load without owner login.

Owner login may protect admin controls, but must not block:

- Featured Properties
- JV Deals
- Published Reels
- Project details
- Public investment information

Return:

PUBLIC_CONTENT_REQUIRES_OWNER_LOGIN=YES/NO

Expected:

NO

==================================================
17. VERIFY APP AND LANDING PAGE USE ONE SOURCE
==================================================

Compare app and landing page for:

- Perez Residence
- Casa Rosario
- IVX Jacksonville Prime
- Project IDs
- Media IDs
- Reel IDs
- Prices
- ROI
- Ownership
- Developer
- Status
- Display order

Return:

PEREZ_APP_LANDING_MATCH=
CASA_APP_LANDING_MATCH=
JACKSONVILLE_APP_LANDING_MATCH=
PROJECT_IDS_MATCH=
MEDIA_IDS_MATCH=
REEL_IDS_MATCH=
FINANCIAL_VALUES_MATCH=

==================================================
18. TEST THE HOME SCREEN END TO END
==================================================

Verify on Android:

- App launches
- Home loads
- Featured Properties render
- JV Deals render
- Reels render
- Images load
- Videos play
- Scroll works
- No jumping
- No blank sections
- No NaN
- No test data
- Refresh works
- Full app restart preserves correct data
- Cellular network works
- Wi-Fi works

==================================================
19. TEST NAVIGATION
==================================================

Verify:

- See All under Featured Properties opens all projects
- See All under JV Deals opens JV deals
- Reels card opens correct reel/project
- Details opens correct project
- Invest Now opens correct investment flow
- Owner Login remains separate
- Back navigation works

==================================================
20. ADD AUTOMATED REGRESSION TESTS
==================================================

Tests must fail if:

- Production Featured Properties count is zero while published projects exist
- Production JV Deals count is zero while published deals exist
- Published reels exist but section is hidden
- `IVX Test` appears in production
- Any financial field renders NaN
- App and landing project IDs differ
- App and landing reel IDs differ
- Empty cache overrides live data
- Public data requires owner authentication

==================================================
21. COMMIT AND DEPLOY
==================================================

After all fixes:

- Run backend tests
- Run frontend tests
- Run typecheck
- Run production build
- Secret scan
- Commit
- Push to GitHub main
- Trigger Render deploy
- Publish Expo update or new Android build if required
- Wait for all deployments to finish

Return:

COMMIT_SHA=
PUSH_STATUS=
RENDER_DEPLOYMENT_ID=
EXPO_UPDATE_ID_OR_BUILD_ID=
DEPLOYMENT_STATUS=

==================================================
22. VERIFY THE REAL PRODUCTION APP
==================================================

Open the newly deployed Android app/build.

Return:

ANDROID_HOME_HTTP_OR_API_STATUS=
FEATURED_PROPERTY_COUNT_LIVE=
JV_DEAL_COUNT_LIVE=
REEL_COUNT_LIVE=
TEST_CARD_VISIBLE_LIVE=
NAN_VISIBLE_LIVE=
PEREZ_VISIBLE_LIVE=
CASA_VISIBLE_LIVE=
JACKSONVILLE_VISIBLE_LIVE=
REELS_VISIBLE_LIVE=
REELS_PLAYBACK_LIVE=

==================================================
23. FINAL RESPONSE — EVIDENCE ONLY
==================================================

Return exactly:

APP_VERSION=
BUILD_NUMBER=
EXPO_UPDATE_ID=
GIT_COMMIT_SHA=
API_BASE_URL=
FEATURED_PROPERTIES_API=
JV_DEALS_API=
REELS_API=
FEATURED_PROPERTY_COUNT=
JV_DEAL_COUNT=
REEL_COUNT=
PEREZ_VISIBLE=
CASA_VISIBLE=
JACKSONVILLE_VISIBLE=
REELS_VISIBLE=
REELS_PLAYBACK=
TEST_RECORDS_REMOVED=
NAN_FIXED=
PUBLIC_CONTENT_REQUIRES_OWNER_LOGIN=
APP_LANDING_SYNC=
ANDROID_QA=
COMMIT_SHA=
PUSH_STATUS=
RENDER_DEPLOYMENT_ID=
EXPO_UPDATE_ID_OR_BUILD_ID=
FINAL_STATUS=VERIFIED/UNVERIFIED

Do not report VERIFIED unless the real Android home screen visibly shows the production projects and Reels.
